🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert AVIF to JPG

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your AVIF files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

AVIF is a modern, highly efficient image format, but plenty of apps still can't open it. This converter turns AVIF into a universally compatible JPG using your browser's built-in AVIF decoder — locally, with no upload.

How to convert

  1. Drag your AVIF images into the box above.
  2. Each is decoded by your browser and saved as JPG.
  3. Download the JPG files.

FAQ

Why can't I open AVIF files?

AVIF is new, so older software hasn't added support yet. Converting to JPG fixes compatibility everywhere.

Related converters

WEBP to JPGPNG to JPG

VaultConvert — free file converters that run entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
